name: @zephyrdeng/pi-review
description: Isolated AI-powered code and plan reviews from the command line
author: ZephyrDeng <zephyrTang@aliyun.com>

scripts.test: npx --yes tsx --test src/args.test.ts src/cli-exit.test.ts src/child-process.test.ts src/review.meta.test.ts src/review-result.test.ts src/loop.test.ts src/meta-footer.test.ts src/prompt.test.ts src/skill-protocol.test.ts src/json-events.test.ts src/install-args.test.ts src/panel-aggregate.test.ts src/matcher.test.ts src/panel-config.test.ts src/panel-loop.test.ts src/panel-cli.test.ts extensions/rv-prompts.test.ts extensions/rv-completions.test.ts extensions/rv-model-priorities.test.ts extensions/rv-locale.test.ts extensions/rv-semantic.test.ts
scripts.test:rv: npx --yes tsx --test extensions/rv-prompts.test.ts extensions/rv-completions.test.ts extensions/rv-model-priorities.test.ts extensions/rv-locale.test.ts extensions/rv-semantic.test.ts
